tooltip.mekanism_card.super_fusion.descr: Combines tier installation, upgrade modules, and memory copy/paste
tooltip.mekanism_card.super_fusion.tier_: Right-click machine: run the current mode; Shift + right-click copies configuration
tooltip.mekanism_card.super_fusion.modul: Left-click air: open settings; Shift + left-click air: cycle fusion mode
tooltip.mekanism_card.super_fusion.selec: Hold the selection key and left-click two corners to run the current mode in that area
tooltip.mekanism_card.super_fusion.memor: Shift + right-click air: clear saved memory
tooltip.mekanism_card.super_fusion.modul: Module upgrade: not selected in inventory
tooltip.mekanism_card.middle_click_insta: Middle-click machine: install all upgrades; hold the FTB Ultimine key for a batch
gui.mekanism_card.super_fusion.title: Super Fusion Card
gui.mekanism_card.super_fusion.tooltip.m: Paste the copied machine factory tier to compatible targets.
Synchronize saved upgrade levels or clear installed upgrades.
Paste the saved configuration and upgrade data to the same machine type.
Apply the saved tier and upgrades, plus complete configuration in Precise mode.
Match compatible upgrades to the saved types and levels; surplus upgrades are returned.
Remove all installed upgrades from target machines and return them to the player.
gui.mekanism_card.super_fusion.tooltip.t: Restrict targets to the copied machine type, or its machine family in Full Paste mode.
Allow compatible operations across different machine types.
Memory mode always requires the exact copied machine type.
tooltip.mekanism_card.batch_selection: Hold the selection key + left-click two corners: run a cuboid batch operation
tooltip.mekanism_card.shortcut.fusion_ex: %1$s: run the current mode; %2$s: copy configuration
tooltip.mekanism_card.shortcut.fusion_ba: %s: batch execute the current fusion mode
tooltip.mekanism_card.ultimate_installer: Uses only 1,000 FE per successful machine; no tier installers are consumed
Reusable and strictly limited to standard Ultimate tier
